objectives: Full architectural review of mx20022 workspace
Evaluate crate boundaries, error design, scheme validation, translation patterns
important_facts: codegen is isolated (no model/parse deps) -- good
Dual validation path (XML scan + typed) in scheme validators
CLI validate command has its own error type not using thiserror
risks_issues: Scheme validator code duplication across cbpr/fednow/sepa
xml_scan fragility acknowledged but still primary path in CLI
No trait abstraction for translation mappings

iteration.summary: Completed full architectural review of all 7 crates. Analyzed dependency graph, error propagation, scheme validation patterns, translation mapping patterns, and codegen pipeline. Identified several findings including scheme validator duplication, xml_scan fragility, cross-module coupling in amount parsing, and missing translation trait abstraction.
